messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0073",
  "title": "2025年",
  "page_index": 21,
  "page_range": "21"
}

Section text:
### 2025年
- 1-10名收入占比：20.92%
- 11-50名收入占比：23.32%
- 51-200名收入占比：29.12%
- 其他移动游戏收入占比：26.64%

message.content: This section provides quantitative metrics on the 2025 mobile game market revenue distribution by ranking tier. It can answer questions regarding: (1) the specific revenue share percentages for mobile games in 2025 across four ranking brackets (top 1–10: 20.92%, 11–50: 23.32%, 51–200: 29.12%, and others: 26.64%); (2) how total market revenue is allocated between top-performing, mid-tier, and long-tail mobile games; and (3) the degree of market concentration or fragmentation within the 2025 mobile gaming sector. The content consists exclusively of numerical data points, serving as statistical evidence for industry revenue analysis and market structure claims.
